permits.description: The renovation relates to two disctinct areas in the house:Second floor: gut renovation of the master bathroom. Bathtub is replaced by a steam shower.First floor: reconfiguration of the floor plan for the back portion of the house. The project includes the demolition of a bearing wall to create an open space and kitchen. New windows and doors on the left side and rear facades. A new stoop will be built to access the patio. Add clapboard cladding and trim to two sides of the cinder block garage.
